title: Skills Online - Canada.ca
content:
The Public Health Agency of Canada no longer supports the delivery of Skills Online.
Skills Online has been an important contributor to enhancing the capacity of Canada’s public health workforce. Since its launch in 2002, the public health landscape has changed significantly. Today there are now over 40 university public health programs across Canada and there are various online courses available to public health professionals.
